/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -std=c++11 -Wall  -O3 -march=native -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libDBoW3.so -o ../lib/libDBoW3.so CMakeFiles/DBoW3.dir/src/BowVector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DBoW3.dir/src/Database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DBoW3.dir/src/DescManip.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DBoW3.dir/src/QueryResults.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DBoW3.dir/src/quicklz.c.o CMakeFiles/DBoW3.dir/src/FeatureVector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DBoW3.dir/src/ScoringObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DBoW3.dir/src/Vocabulary.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/cuda-11.8/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-11.8/lib64:/home/jiongkesi2/SLAM_Ev/opencv-4.8.1/lib/lib /home/jiongkesi2/SLAM_Ev/opencv-4.8.1/lib/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.8.1 /home/jiongkesi2/SLAM_Ev/opencv-4.8.1/lib/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.8.1 /home/jiongkesi2/SLAM_Ev/opencv-4.8.1/lib/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.8.1 /home/jiongkesi2/SLAM_Ev/opencv-4.8.1/lib/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.8.1 /home/jiongkesi2/SLAM_Ev/opencv-4.8.1/lib/lib/libopencv_cudev.so.4.8.1
